channel.title: Installation on CrySPY
channel.description: Recent content in Installation on CrySPY

item.title: System requirements
item.description: System requirements Note You need (CrySPY + Python environment + structure optimizer) in your workstation, super computer, etc. Table of contents Python Structure optimizer find_wy (optional)

item.title: CrySPY
item.description: CrySPY CrySPY (>= 1.0.0) is available in PyPI. You can install by pip. Table of contents CrySPY 1.0.0 or later CrySPY 0.10.3 or earlier

item.title: CrySPY utility (optional)
item.description: Setting up Python environment in your local PC is useful to analyze CrySPY results. Utility tools (jupyter notebook and python scripts) are available for analysis and visualization. Input examples are also included in CrySPY utility. Info See also cryspy_utility You need several Python libraries such as jupyter NumPy pandas matplotlib pymatgen Download CrySPY utility Git $ git clone https://github.com/Tomoki-YAMASHITA/CrySPY_utility.git zip Go to CrySPY utility and click green Code button, then choose Download ZIP.
